name: Gramigne with Sausage and Kale (or Black Cabbage)
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium red onion, chopped, in 1/2 inch dice
1 Pound Italian sausage with fennel seeds, crumbled
1 Bunch kale (or black cabbage), chopped, in 1/2 inch ribbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts water to a boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
2. In a 12-inch to 14-inch saute pan, heat olive oil over medium heat until just softened, about five to seven minutes. Add crumbled sausage and cook until browned.
3. Drain any excess grease from the pan. Stir in tomato sauce and chopped kale, then cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until just "al dente," then drain.
5. Remove the lid from the saute pan and add the hot pasta. Toss everything together well to combine.
6. Serve immediately. Drizzle with some olio nuovo or best quality tableside oil.
Serves: 4
